kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09D. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09D" and put them into a temporary table called J09D_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are four additional overrides that always result in "EVU": houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 500 and 599, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 900 and 999, and houses located in the areas of Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld.

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

There are two more classifications to handle. First, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024 (based on Record created on). For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING". Export them as a CSV file named "J09D_MANDATORY_READING" with the columns listed below and send it to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com.

Second, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024. For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL". Export them as a CSV file named "J09D_DIRECT_MAIL" with the columns listed below and upload that file to the send_bulk_mail service so emails go out to all those customers directly.

Finally, export all remaining entries (excluding MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL) as a CSV file named "J09D" with the same columns. Send that to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

The columns for all exports are: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_temp; CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_talbe WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09D%';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM decision_talbe WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09D%';

content.text: {"success":false,"error":"You can only execute one statement at a time.","message":"SQL execution failed"}

structured_content.error: You can only execute one statement at a time.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_temp
CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_talbe WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09D%'
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09D_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END
SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name IN ('decision_table','decision_talbe')

UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld')
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." TEXT
UPDATE J09D_temp SET "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = (SELECT e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM eablg e WHERE e.Installation = J09D_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1)
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN TITLE TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN FORENAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN SURNAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN STREET TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN STREETNO TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN EMAIL TEXT

UPDATE J09D_temp SET TITLE = (SELECT TITLE FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), FORENAME = (SELECT FORENAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SURNAME = (SELECT SURNAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREET = (SELECT STREET FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREETNO = (SELECT STREETNO FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), POST_CODE1 = COALESCE((SELECT POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), POST_CODE1), CITY1 = COALESCE((SELECT CITY1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY1), CITY2 = COALESCE((SELECT CITY2 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY2), EMAIL = (SELECT EMAIL FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR)

UPDATE J09D_temp SET TITLE = (SELECT TITLE FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), FORENAME = (SELECT FORENAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SURNAME = (SELECT SURNAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREET = (SELECT STREET FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREETNO = (SELECT STREETNO FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), POST_CODE1 = COALESCE((SELECT POST_CODE1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), POST_CODE1), CITY1 = COALESCE((SELECT CITY1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY1), CITY2 = COALESCE((SELECT CITY2 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY2), EMAIL = (SELECT EMAIL FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09D_temp.EQUNR)

UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2)

UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2) AND ENTSCHEIDUNG != 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09D_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT DISTINCT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09D_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'

SELECT DISTINCT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09D_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING','DIRECT_MAIL')

args.email: Please find attached the J09D mandatory reading file for internal processing.
Please find attached the J09D meter readings export.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_temp
